title: Today's Tech Brief: Highly reviewed speaker can be hacked over the air to infect connected devices
summary: A highly reviewed speaker can be hacked to infect devices, Summer Game Fest Live 2026 updates, and tech security concerns.
imageAlt: Image from source article for Highly reviewed speaker can be hacked over the air to infect connected devices
imageCaption: Highly reviewed speaker can be hacked over the air to infect connected devices
imageSourceTitle: Highly reviewed speaker can be hacked over the air to infect connected devices

body.text: I've got a few interesting tech updates for you today. First up, a popular speaker that's been getting rave reviews can apparently be hacked over the air to infect connected devices. According to a report from Ars Technica, this vulnerability is a concern for anyone with a bunch of smart devices hooked up to their network. It's a bit unsettling to think that something meant to make our lives easier could be used against us.

The speaker in question is a well-known brand, and the good news is that the company behind it is taking steps to address the issue. Still, it's a reminder that even the most seemingly secure devices can have vulnerabilities. I've been digging into this story, and it's clear that this is a complex issue with no easy solutions. For now, it's just another reason to be mindful of the devices we connect to our networks.

Next, if you're a gamer, you might have caught the Summer Game Fest Live 2026 event that happened recently. The Verge had a great rundown of all the biggest news, trailers, and announcements. It was a bit like a virtual game expo, with lots of exciting reveals and updates on upcoming titles. I'm not a huge gamer myself, but it's always fun to see what's on the horizon.

My quick read: today's tech stories are less about one giant thunderclap and more about a lively weather pattern. A little platform drama here, a little artificial intelligence irony there, and suddenly the industry has enough material for a very caffeinated morning show.
